back_translation: And the daughters of Zelophehad son of Hepher, son of Gilead, son of Machir, son of Manasseh, approached, of the clans of Manasseh son of Joseph; and these are the names of his daughters: Mahlah, Noah, and Hoglah, and Milcah, and Tirzah.
And they stood before Moses and before Eleazar the priest, and before the leaders and the whole congregation, at the entrance of the Tent of Meeting, saying:
'Our father died in the wilderness, and he was not in the midst of the congregation who gathered against the LORD in the company of Korah; for in his own sin he died, and he had no sons.'
'Why should the name of our father be diminished from the midst of his clan, because he has no son? Give to us a possession in the midst of the brothers of our father.'
And Moses brought their case before the LORD.
And the LORD said to Moses, saying:

'Rightly the daughters of Zelophehad speak; giving you shall surely give to them a possession of inheritance in the midst of the brothers of their father, and you shall transfer the inheritance of their father to them.'
'And to the sons of Israel you shall speak, saying: A man when he dies, and a son he has not, then you shall transfer his inheritance to his daughter.'
'And if he has no daughter, then you shall give his inheritance to his brothers.'
'And if he has no brothers, then you shall give his inheritance to the brothers of his father.'

'And if his father has no brothers, then you shall give his inheritance to his kinsman nearest to him from his clan, and he shall possess it; and it shall be for the sons of Israel a statute of judgment, as the LORD commanded Moses.'
And the LORD said to Moses: 'Go up to this mountain of the Abarim, and see the land which I have given to the sons of Israel.'
'And you shall see it, and you shall be gathered to your people, also you, as Aaron your brother was gathered.'

'As you rebelled against My mouth in the Wilderness of Zin, in the strife of the congregation, to sanctify Me by the waters before their eyes; these are the waters of Meribah-Kadesh, the Wilderness of Zin.'
And Moses spoke to the LORD, saying:
'Let the LORD, the God of the spirits of all flesh, appoint a man over the congregation,'

'who shall go out before them, and who shall come in before them, and who shall lead them out, and who shall bring them in; that the congregation of the LORD shall not be like sheep which have no shepherd.'
And the LORD said to Moses: 'Take for yourself Joshua son of Nun, a man in whom is the Spirit; and lay your hand upon him.'
'And cause him to stand before Eleazar the priest, and before all the congregation; and commission him in their sight.'
'And give of your majesty upon him, in order that all the congregation of the sons of Israel may obey.'

'And before Eleazar the priest he shall stand, and he shall ask for him by the judgment of the Urim before the LORD; according to his mouth they shall go out, and according to his mouth they shall come in — he, and all the sons of Israel with him, and all the congregation.'
And Moses did as the LORD commanded him; and he took Joshua, and caused him to stand before Eleazar the priest, and before all the congregation.
And he laid his hands upon him, and commissioned him, as the LORD spoke by the hand of Moses.
